description: SDD hooks: 3 UserPromptSubmit gates (propose: [TBD] cleared; apply: prerequisites ready — proposal with all four sections + single active change; archive: flow wasn't bypassed) + 1 Stop reminder (turn ended with approved proposal but no verification ledger). Shell-form entries: Claude Code runs the command string under sh on macOS/Linux and Git Bash on Windows, so ONE POSIX sh implementation serves every platform (Git Bash ships with Git for Windows, which Claude Code's own Bash tool already requires). $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is expanded by the shell from the exported environment; the gates read the project dir from $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR and the user input from the stdin JSON `prompt` field (probe-verified against real stdin, 2026-07-15).
